item.title: FabrizioRomano: Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 1min Raphinha: “Atletico Madrid committed I don't know how many fouls… and the refere
item.description: Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 1min Raphinha: “Atletico Madrid committed I don't know how many fouls… and the referee didn't show a single yellow card”. 148 115 1 mil 18 mil

item.title:
beINSPORTS_EN: beIN SPORTS @beINSPORTS_EN · 4min "Unfortunately, as so many times this season, the VAR was not in our favour..."

item.description:
beIN SPORTS @beINSPORTS_EN · 4min "Unfortunately, as so many times this season, the VAR was not in our favour..."
Arne Slot reacts to Liverpool’s #UCL exit and gives his initial thoughts on Hugo Ekitike’s injury.
@zmansour75
#beINUCL #LIVPSG #LFC 3 804
